titleStmt.title: SII 22.299: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 299. (A.R. No. 299 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH, WEST AND NORTH WALLS OF THE FIRST PRĀKĀRA. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—Date lost.

summary.p: This is a mutilated and damaged inscription which registers an agreement given by the assembly of Paṅgavērkkam (?) alias Śōḻakulatilaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Vēḷā-nāḍu a division of Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam to the temple at Tirumālpēṟu for an amount of gold invested with them, by the temple with god Chaṇḍēśvara as agent.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—ṇaikirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovintacantaṉ māviḻin toṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamu n=toṭukaṭaṟcaṅku voṭṭaṉ mahipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākattañcuvittaruḷi yum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittira neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum naṭuvuḷ palakalañ celuttic caṅkirāma vijai yottuṅkapanmaṉākiya kiṭārattaraicaṉai vākayam porukaṭak kumpakkariyoṭu makap paṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉ ṉakar (nakar)p port toḻil vācalil viccātirat toraṇamum moyttoḷirp puṉaimaṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟaijivijaiyamum tuṟai nirppaṉṉaiyum paṉmalaivūreyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkā
copamum koppuṟuniṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamum kāvalampuricai mevilim paṅkamum viḷaippañcattūruṭai vaḷaippantūrum kalaittakkorpukaḻ talaittakkolamum titamāval viṉai Ilāmuṟitecamum teṉakkavār poḻil mānakka vāramum toṭukaṭaṟkāveṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māp perun taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḻadevaṟku yāṇ jayaṅ koṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭattu veḷanāṭṭu peṅkaveṟkkamāṉa coḻakulatilatac caruppetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom kaiyyeḻuttu vallaṉāṭṭut tirumālpeṟṟut tirumālpeṟuṭaiyār śrīpaṇṭārattu matyasthanāna caṇḍeśvaraṉpakkal ṉāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭava poṉ dharma kaṭṭaḷaikkallāl tuḷainiṟaipoṉ
Digital edition of SII 22.299 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
